Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPLOG1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; Q ; CREATE(XML) ;create entry I $D(^DVPLOG)=0 S ^DVPLOG("CNT")=0 ;Create if doesn't exists and reset FIFO counter S DVPLGGLB="^DVPLOG",DVPLGNOW=$$NOW^XLFDT(),DVPLGLEG=DVPLGGLB_"(""A"","_DVPLGNOW_","_$J_")",DVPRSCNT=0 ; rotate FIFO buffer if needed I +$G(@DVPLGGLB@("CNT"))>=DEBUGMAX D . S IX=$O(@DVPLGGLB@("A","")),IY=$O(@DVPLGGLB@("A",IX,"")),CAT=@DVPLGGLB@("A",IX,IY,"CAT") . K @DVPLGGLB@("A",IX,IY),@DVPLGGLB@("C",CAT,IX,IY) ; increase FIFO counter I +$G(@DVPLGGLB@("CNT"))<DEBUGMAX S @DVPLGGLB@("CNT")=+@DVPLGGLB@("CNT")+1 ; S @DVPLGLEG@(0)=$P($T(VERSION+1^DVPVER),";",3) ; I $D(@XML)=1 S @DVPLGLEG@("XML",1)=@XML I $D(@XML)>9 D . N CNT,IX S IX="",CNT=0 . F S IX=$O(@XML@(IX)) Q:IX="" D . . S CNT=CNT+1,@DVPLGLEG@("XML",CNT)=@XML@(IX) S @DVPLGLEG@("CAT")="UNKNOWN" S @DVPLGGLB@("C","UNKNOWN",DVPLGNOW,$J)="" Q ; CATUP(CAT) ;category update K @DVPLGGLB@("C","UNKNOWN",DVPLGNOW,$J) S @DVPLGGLB@("C",CAT,DVPLGNOW,$J)="",@DVPLGLEG@("CAT")=CAT Q ; RESPUP(RESP) ;response update S DVPRSCNT=DVPRSCNT+1,@DVPLGLEG@("DATA",DVPRSCNT)=RESP Q ; GLBLUP(NODE) ;global data update M @DVPLGLEG@("GLBL")=@NODE Q ; INIT ; S DEBUGMODE=0,DEBUGMAX=100 Q
